{ "name": "@babel/helpers", "version": "7.28.6", "description": "Collection of helper functions used by Babel transforms.", "author": "The Babel Team (https://babel.dev/team)", "homepage": "https://babel.dev/docs/en/next/babel-helpers", "license": "MIT", "publishConfig": { "access": "public" }, "repository": { "type": "git", "url": "https://github.com/babel/babel.git", "directory": "packages/babel-helpers" }, "main": "./lib/index.js", "dependencies": { "@babel/template": "^7.28.6", "@babel/types": "^7.28.6" }, "devDependencies": { "@babel/generator": "^7.28.6", "@babel/helper-plugin-test-runner": "^7.27.1", "@babel/parser": "^7.28.6", "regenerator-runtime": "^0.14.0" }, "engines": { "node": ">=6.9.0" }, "type": "commonjs" }
